purpose: Ranks India's FY2025-26 bilateral trade balance by partner country to identify where India's forex outflow is concentrated, then traces multi-year (not 6-month) policy history behind the five biggest deficit relationships.
source: Commerce Ministry Trade Intelligence & Analytics Portal (trade-analytics.commerce.gov.in), country-wise export and import panels, Financial Year 2025-26 selection
coverage_note: 38 of ~217 trading partners -- the subset where both an export and import figure had already been captured in this repo's earlier TIA portal session work. Top 15 deficit and top 8 surplus countries are all covered.

china_electronics.assessment: Independent reporting six years into Atmanirbhar Bharat states it has not reduced structural import dependence; China remains India's largest single bilateral deficit.

russia_crude_oil.payment_mechanism: Indian refiners (IOCL, BPCL, HPCL) settle nearly all Russian oil purchases in UAE dirhams via Emirati traders
russia_crude_oil.note: Market-driven reorientation, not a Cabinet-approved scheme -- the fastest-moving driver of India's country-deficit ranking.

uae_switzerland_gold_gems.policy: Foreign Trade Policy Chapter 4: duty-free import of cut & polished diamonds (up to 5% of FOB export value) and gold/silver/platinum jewellery inputs, for manufacture of exportable products; reinforced by RoDTEP export-duty remission.
uae_switzerland_gold_gems.note: Deliberately open, not an import-substitution target -- the flows fund the re-export trade.

indonesia_malaysia_palm_oil.nmeo_op_launched: August 2021, Rs 11,040 crore outlay (Rs 8,844cr central + Rs 2,196cr state share)
indonesia_malaysia_palm_oil.nmeo_op_target: 11.2 lakh tonnes crude palm oil production by 2025-26, across 15 states, 21.75 lakh hectares potential area
indonesia_malaysia_palm_oil.assessment: More than 4 years of continuous, funded policy attention; import dependence has not meaningfully declined.

gulf_crude_iraq_saudi_qatar.note: Traditional, steady crude/LNG suppliers; together with Russia, make energy imports the largest structural component of India's country-level deficit list.

niryat_portal_note.access_status: Blocked -- both the Browser tool and a direct HTTPS/curl request failed at the TLS handshake stage, consistent with prior experience on other DGFT-family domains.
reconstructed_features_from_public_sourc: World Map view, Commodity view, and Table view
Color-coded (traffic-light style) tracking of each commodity/country pair against defined targets
District-level geospatial drill-down for state export hubs
Real-time data across 30+ commodity groups and 200+ countries
niryat_portal_note.design_takeaway: The target-vs-actual traffic-light framing is a good pattern this bulletin's timeline section could adopt in a future iteration; the diverging bar chart used here ranks magnitude but doesn't score each relationship against an explicit government target the way NIRYAT does.
